Name: Hungry Teeth
Description: The Garou's teeth seem unchanged in the mundane world but appear even sharper and more vicious than usual in the Umbra. The teeth can bite into spirits more easily, granting the Garou the ability to absorb some of the spirit's essence. A hunger-spirit or scavenger pack grants this Gift.
System:
This Gift is free an instantaneous while in Crinos form. The Garou adds half their Wisdom rating (round up) to damage from bite attacksagainst spirits while in the Umbra, or gains a one-die bonus against spirits and fomori in the mundane world.
 If the Garou kills a supernatural opponent with thie Gift active during a scene, they restore one point of Superficial Willpower-the Storyteller may allow for the recovery of Aggravated Willpower if the entity was sufficiently powerful.
